page.title: About Us
page.description: Learn about Africore Logistics, our story, mission, vision, and the people driving integrated logistics across Southern and Central Africa.

content.headline: Who We Are
content.subHeadline: Your trusted partner for integrated logistics, customs clearance, and warehousing across Southern and Central Africa.

content.headline: Operational Excellence with a Corridor-Focused Mindset
paragraphs: Founded to address the growing need for a coordinated logistics partner capable of navigating the region's diverse regulatory environments, infrastructure variances, and border complexities.
By combining deep local expertise with a corridor-focused operational model, we deliver end-to-end supply chain visibility and control for businesses operating across Southern and Central Africa.

items.title: Integrated Solutions
items.description: Specializing in integrated logistics, customs clearance, and warehousing.

items.title: Regional Mastery
items.description: Deep local expertise navigating diverse regulatory environments and infrastructure variances.

items.title: Visibility & Control
items.description: Corridor-focused operational model delivering complete end-to-end supply chain visibility.

cards.title: Our Mission
cards.description: To provide agile, transparent, and cost-effective logistics solutions that enable our clients to expand their reach across Africa's most dynamic markets.

cards.title: Our Vision
cards.description: To become the preferred integrated logistics partner for businesses trading throughout the Southern African Development Community (SADC) and beyond, recognized for operational excellence and corridor mastery.

sections.headline: Meet the Team Behind the Corridors
sections.description: Experienced logistics professionals dedicated to delivering reliable, compliant, and efficient cross-border supply chain solutions.

members.name: Leadership Member
members.bio: Experienced logistics leader with extensive expertise across the SADC region.

members.name: Leadership Member
members.bio: Specialist in customs compliance, transport coordination, and operational excellence.

members.name: Leadership Member
members.bio: Focused on delivering client-centric logistics solutions and long-term partnerships.

content.headline: Ready to Streamline Your Cross-Border Supply Chain?
content.description: Partner with Africore Logistics for reliable transport, customs clearance, and warehousing solutions across Southern and Central Africa.
